Octavio Dotel

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Right

6-0, 230lb (183cm, 104kg)

Born: November 25, 1973 in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic do

Died: April 8, 2025 in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic

Buried: Jardin Memorial, Santo Domingo, Distrito Nacional

High School: Liceo Eansino Afuera (Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic)

Debut: June 26, 1999 (Age 25-213d, 17,492nd in major league history)
   vs. ATL 4.1 IP, 5 H, 3 SO, 5 BB, 6 ER, L

Last Game: April 19, 2013 (Age 39-145d)
   vs. LAA 0.2 IP, 4 H, 0 SO, 1 BB, 5 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1999 season

Agents: Dan Horwits

Full Name: Octavio Eduardo Dotel

Pronunciation: \OC-tay-vee-oh, DOH-tel\

Frequently Asked Questions

When was Octavio Dotel born?

Octavio Dotel was born on November 25, 1973.

Where was Octavio Dotel born?

Octavio Dotel was born in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic.

How tall was Octavio Dotel?

Octavio Dotel was 6-0 (183 cm) tall.

How much did Octavio Dotel weigh when playing?

Octavio Dotel weighed 230 lbs (104 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Octavio Dotel play?

Octavio Dotel played 15 seasons.

Is Octavio Dotel in the Hall of Fame?

Octavio Dotel has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

What position did Octavio Dotel play?

Octavio Dotel was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Octavio Dotel have?

Octavio Dotel had 1,143 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Octavio Dotel played for?

Octavio Dotel played for 13 teams; the Atlanta Braves, Chicago White Sox, Colorado Rockies, Detroit Tigers, Houston Astros, Kansas City Royals, Los Angeles Dodgers, New York Mets, New York Yankees, Oakland Athletics, Pittsburgh Pirates, St. Louis Cardinals and Toronto Blue Jays.

How many World Series has Octavio Dotel won?

Octavio Dotel won 1 World Series.

When did Octavio Dotel retire?

Octavio Dotel last played in 2013.
